acid_spit.name: Acid Spit
acid_spit.description: Glands behind your molars brew a corrosive bile you can hawk at an enemy. More MP, more meat dissolved.

messages.self: You hawk a gob of hissing acid at {target}!
messages.room: {name} spits a stream of smoking acid at {target}!
messages.target: {name} spits burning acid across your skin!

manbeast.name: Manbeast
manbeast.description: The animal under your skin comes when called: claws lengthen, senses sharpen, and you fight like the predator you half are.

messages.self: Your jaw cracks and reforms. Claws slide from your fingertips.
messages.room: {name} hunches and changes — claws, fangs, and hungry eyes.

insectoid.name: Insectoid
insectoid.description: Chitinous plates sheath your back and forearms. Armor you were born wearing.

messages.examine: Plates of dark chitin armor their body.

frog_legs.name: Frog Legs
frog_legs.description: Your legs coil with amphibian power. When a fight goes wrong, nothing in the Zone catches you.

messages.examine: Their legs bend strangely, corded with too much muscle.

extreme_reflexes.name: Extreme Reflexes
extreme_reflexes.description: Time goes thick around you. Burn MP to move between the moments.

messages.self: The world slows to a crawl. You move through it like water.
messages.room: {name} blurs, moving faster than eyes can follow.

luminescence.name: Luminescence
luminescence.description: Your veins carry their own cold light. Light the dark — or pour it into someone's eyes.

messages.self: Cold green light wells up beneath your skin.
messages.room: {name} begins to glow with cold green light.

sonar.name: Sonar
sonar.description: You hear the shape of the world. Darkness means nothing to you.

messages.examine: Their ears are large, ridged, always moving.

reptilian.name: Reptilian
reptilian.description: Cold blood, old patience. Your flesh knits where others scar.

messages.self: Your skin ripples; torn flesh seals over in fresh scales.
messages.room: {name}'s wounds close beneath a sheen of new scales.

corpse_eater.name: Corpse Eater
corpse_eater.description: Nothing in the Zone is too far gone to be a meal. Rot, carrion, the unspeakable — your gut welcomes it all.

messages.examine: Their teeth are stained dark, and they smell faintly of carrion.

rot_eater.name: Rot-Eater
rot_eater.description: The Rot doesn't burn you — it feeds you. You walk the hotspots like a garden and come out stronger.

messages.examine: Something about them thrives where everything else withers.

parasite.name: Parasite
parasite.description: A touch, a moment, and what's theirs becomes yours. Life flows along the thin proboscis hidden in your palm.

messages.self: You press your palm to {target} and DRINK.
messages.room: {name} lays a hand on {target}, and {target} withers.
messages.target: {name}'s touch pulls the life out of you!
